mapper.select: SELECT tc.business_unit AS major_category, bc.code_name AS business_unit_name, COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_status = 'FAIL') AS fail_count FROM TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE tc LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE bc ON bc.code_value = tc.business_unit AND bc.deleted_at IS NULL AND bc.code_group_id = ( SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = 'BUSINESS_CATEGORY' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1 ) WHERE tc.deleted_at IS NULL AND tc.business_unit IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tc.business_unit, bc.code_name ORDER BY bc.code_name NULLS LAST

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE test_status = 'FAIL') AS fail_count FROM TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
